description: This file defines the UsersRepo class, which provides database access methods for user data, including fetching by email or id, creating users, and authenticating users by verifying passwords.

classes.name: UsersRepo
classes.description: Repository class for user-related database operations.

methods.name: __init__(self, conn)
methods.description: Constructor that initializes the repository with a database connection.

methods.name: Optional[Dict[str,Any]] get_by_email(self, email: str)
methods.description: Fetches a user record by email.

methods.name: Optional[Dict[str,Any]] get_by_id(self, user_id: str)
methods.description: Fetches a user record by user ID.

methods.name: Dict[str,Any] create(self, *, email: str, password: str)
methods.description: Creates a new user with email and password, stores password hash.

methods.name: Optional[Dict[str,Any]] authenticate(self, *, email: str, password: str)
methods.description: Authenicates a user by email and password, verifying the password hash.

ctags.name: authenticate
ctags.pattern: /^    def authenticate(self, *, email: str, password: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:$/

ctags.name: create
ctags.pattern: /^    def create(self, *, email: str, password: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:$/

ctags.name: get_by_email
ctags.pattern: /^    def get_by_email(self, email: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:$/

ctags.name: get_by_id
ctags.pattern: /^    def get_by_id(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:$/
